packets.description: GOLD-001: Single-screen structural resolution. One active campaign schedule, no overrides, no emergency, no sponsorships. PRE resolves at LEVEL_3 (Campaign Layer). America/Chicago timezone. First delivery — no prior delivery log.
GOLD-002: Area inheritance. Screen in area with no screen-specific or tv_group-specific schedule. Area-level schedule (specificity=3) is active. PRE resolves at LEVEL_3.
GOLD-003: Active emergency overrides all other content. LEVEL_0 resolution. Emergency content is sol
GOLD-004: Operational override (is_operational=true) takes precedence over campaign schedule. LEVEL_
GOLD-005: All resolution levels skip. PRE falls to LEVEL_5 system fallback. Output contains system:f

EDGE-001 (RETIRED): Timestamp 1748203200000 resolved to Sunday 2025-05-25, not Monday 2026-05-25 as described. Superseded by EDGE-001v2 (a1b2c3d4-e001-4000-8000-000000000111). Retirement record: ret-edge001-20260523.

EDGE-001v2: Schedule with days_of_week=[1] (Monday-only). Evaluation time is Monday 2026-05-25T14:00:00 CDT (at=1779735600000). Schedule is active. Tests day-of-week constraint with IANA timezone. Replaces defective EDGE-001.
EDGE-002: Schedule with days_of_week=[1] (Monday-only). Evaluation time is Wednesday 2026-05-27T14:0
EDGE-003: Override with expires_at in the past is treated as inactive. PRE skips LEVEL_1 and resolve
CHAOS-001: DB unavailable — minimal system state (no schedules, overrides, content). PRE must return
